---
title: "Research Assistant"
description: |  
  Research Assistants, Get Learn Bioinformatics    Explore the profiles of our Research Assistants, including their academic background, roles, and contributions.    
  
  Click on any Research Assistant to view more detailed information.

listing:
  - id: ra1
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - ra1   
    type: default
    grid-item-border: true
    grid-item-align: right
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: ra2
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 250px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - ra2
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: ra3
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - ra3
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: ra4
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - ra4
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: ra5
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - ra5
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: ra6
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - ra6
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: ra7
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - ra7
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: ra8
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - ra8
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: ra9
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - ra9
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: ra10
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [title, description, image]
    contents: 
      - ra10
    type: default
    grid-item-border: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---
